productDisplayName: Nike Women Ballista II White Sports Shoes
description: White shoe with mesh upper and synthetic overlays with Nike swoosh on the sidePadded tongue with branding and central lace-upsPurple padded inner lining with a cushioned sockliner for in-step comfortReinforced, padded collar for optimum comfortRubber outsole with rectangular lugs and grooves on the forefoot and backfoot, impact support system along the length of the foot
